Meta.title: NewsMap
Meta.description: World news portal with geographic curation. Pick your sources on a map. No algorithm.

Landing.headline: Your world news, on the map
Landing.subheadline: Choose the publications you want to read. No algorithm — just the sources you pick.
Landing.feature_map_desc: Explore countries and subscribe to the publications that interest you.
Landing.feature_rss_desc: Articles refreshed every 15 minutes straight from the original sources.
Landing.feature_i18n_desc: Interface available in Spanish and English. Sources in both languages.

Onboarding.step1_title: What kind of reader are you?
Onboarding.step1_subtitle: Pick a starter profile. You can adjust it in the next step.
Onboarding.profile_latam_desc: The major newspapers from Argentina, Mexico, Colombia, Brazil and more.
Onboarding.profile_global_desc: BBC, The Guardian, Al Jazeera, tagesschau, ANSA and other international references.
Onboarding.profile_spain_desc: El País, El Mundo, El Confidencial and La Vanguardia.
Onboarding.profile_custom_desc: Pick the countries and sources you want to follow yourself.
Onboarding.step2_subtitle: Add or remove sources to match your preferences.

Feed.title: My feed
Feed.empty_desc: Subscribe to some sources from the map to get started.
Feed.new_articles: {count, plural, one {# new article} other {# new articles}}

Map.title: Source map
Map.subtitle: Click a country to browse its available publications.
Map.sources_available: {count, plural, one {# source available} other {# sources available}}
Map.no_sources: No sources available for this country yet.

Auth.signin_subtitle: Save your sources and access from any device.
Auth.magic_link_sent: Check your email — we sent you an access link.
Auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.sources_empty: You're not subscribed to any sources yet.
Settings.delete_confirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and cannot be undone.

Article.paywall_notice: This article may be behind a paywall.

Errors.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
